free_text: Measurement of residues from the 6Li+Zn reaction:
Analysis of fusion phenomena below 7.1 MeV/nucleon
natZn foils (99.99% pure, 2.8 mg/cm2 thick) and Al
backing having thickness 1.8 mg/cm2, Al foil was
planted between two successive target foils
- Statistical uncertainty in the photopeak counts
- Energy degradation at successive target-catcher foil
Harikrishnan BARC and Himanshu G IGCAR
